title: Englısh Preparatory Program Class Hours
content:
Announcements

Details

Englısh Preparatory Program Class Hours

Lesson Times for Foundation (A1) Level

Monday-Tuesday: 09:00-13:40 (Face to Face)

Wednesday: 09:00-12:40 (Face to Face)

Thursday-Friday: 09:00-13:30 (Online)

Lesson Times for Pre-Intermediate (A2)- Intermediate (B1) – Upper Intermediate (B2) Levels

Monday-Tuesday: 09:00-13:30 (Online)

Wednesday: 13:00-16:40 (Face to Face)

Thursday-Friday: 09:00-13:40 (Face to Face)

Students are expected to check their student email accounts regularly.

Class lists will be announced on OBS on October 14, 2021.
